Vinayapiṭaka/Musāvādavagga/X/13.text: Tena samayena hoti (Sī, Syā, Sāratthadīpanīṭīkāyaṁ ca)

Pācityādiaṭṭhakathā/Musāvādavagga/X/78.text: Na sāsane vāssa (Sī), na sāsane tassa (Syā)

Vinayapiṭaka/Sappāṇakavagga/X/417.text: Ma 1. 182 piṭṭhe Alagaddūpamasuttavaṇṇanāyaṁ; Ma 2. 27 piṭṭhe Potalisuttavaṇṇanāyaṁ.

Pācityādiaṭṭhakathā/Pādukavaggavaṇṇanā/X.text: Evaṁ mā bhijja (Sī), evaṁ bhijjati (Syā, Ka)

Vinayapiṭaka/Mahāvaggaaṭṭhakathā/X/8.text: Ṭhito, so ca (Syā, Ka) Ma-Ṭṭha 2 Pāsarāsisuttavaṇṇanāyaṁ ca.

Vinayapiṭaka/Mahāvaggaaṭṭhakathā/X/181.text: ...attacatutthena attapañcamena vā (Ka), attacatutthena vā attapañcamena vā (Syā)

Vinayapiṭaka/Mahāvaggaaṭṭhakathā/X/254.text: (Ekaseyyanti ekassa seyyaṁ. Kālayuttanti uposathakālayuttaṁ. Uposathakālanti attho.) (Ka)
